# Targets

Approved target technologies for mixed-stack modernization. Defines *what is approved* — not implementation steps.

## Target Frameworks

| Language | Target Version | Notes |
|----------|---------------|-------|
| Java | 21 LTS | |
| .NET | 8 | |
| TypeScript / Node.js | Node 22 LTS | |

## Target Compute Services

| Platform | Use When |
|----------|----------|
| Azure Container Apps | All services (Java, .NET, TypeScript) |
